name: current-2026-role-v3-tailguard-smooth-tailrisk

notes: The smooth variants keep Conservative TailGuard's score-mean correction and only scale the win-probability uncertainty overlay by expected margin and confidence.
Promotion requires probability-quality improvement without damaging score MAE, margin MAE, or the existing TailGuard deployment score.
